name: perch-search-alerts

outputs.description: Destination port of the alert. Perch.Alert.SrcPort Source port of the alert.
outputs.name: Perch.Alert.DestPort

outputs.description: Destination IP of the alert. Perch.Alert.IndicatorID Indicator ID of the alert.
outputs.name: Perch.Alert.DestIP

outputs.description: IP address of the source. Perch.Alert.SrcGeo.Country Country of the threat.
outputs.name: Perch.Alert.SrcIP

outputs.description: Latitude of the detected threat. Perch.Alert.SrcGeo.Longitude Longitude of the detected threat.
outputs.name: Perch.Alert.SrcGeo.Latitude

outputs.description: ID of the sensor that reported the threat. Perch.Alert.Title Title of the alert.
outputs.name: Perch.Alert.SensorID

outputs.description: Protocol on which the alert was detected. Perch.Alert.ID ID of the alert.
outputs.name: Perch.Alert.Protocol

outputs.description: ID of the observable event. Perch.Alert.TS Date
outputs.name: Perch.Alert.ObservableID
